_description_override:
Tropical sanctuary with beachfront spa
Powdery sands line the paradisiacal palm beach with complimentary snorkeling trips revealing vibrant reef life. The colonial-style hotel features two restaurants with delicious cuisine and exceptional service. Guests can enjoy the expansive spa offering well-priced massages and treatments.
